category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a package manager for the web.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official bower.io site, which uses the Bower name.
docs_sources: Official bower.io documentation provides API, package creation, and configuration pages.
repo_sources: Official bower.io site links to Bower on GitHub; the official source-control repository is bower/bower.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies web package management; source_facts.executables lists the bower CLI; official bower.io docs describe command-line and programmatic API usage.
